zh.lifeSummary: 當Walter de Thornhill II於大約1225年出生在英國越可爾恩爾時，他的父親John de Thornhill46歲，母親Olivia Mare34歲。他於1274年與Cecelia Thornhill結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1260年享年36歲。

zh-hans.Sherborne, Dorsetshire, England: 英国英格兰多瑟特黑爾波內
zh-hans.Thornhill, Dewsbury, West Riding, Yorksh: 英国英格兰越可爾恩爾
zh-hans.Huddersfield, Yorkshire, England: 英国越可爾德斯費爾德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Walter de Thornhill II于大约1225年出生在英国越可爾恩爾时，他的父亲John de Thornhill46岁，母亲Olivia Mare34岁。他于1274年与Cecelia Thornhill结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1260年享年36岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Thornhill
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Lancashire and Yorkshire): habitational name from any of various places called Thornhill, for example in Derbyshire, Yorkshire, Dorset, and Wiltshire, from Old English thorn ‘thorn tree’ + hyll ‘hill’.

variants.name: Thornell
meanings: Swedish: ornamental name composed of the element thorn, an ornamental spelling of torn ‘thorn bush’, + the suffix -ell, a derivative of the Latin adjectival ending -elius.

nameMeanings.name: Walter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from wald ‘rule’ + heri, hari ‘army’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England, superseding the native Old English form, Wealdhere. It was a very popular name in medieval England, normally pronounced ‘Water’.

variants.name: Walther
meanings: from wald ‘rule’ + heri ‘army’; name of the famous medieval minnesinger Walther von der Vogelweide ( c.1170– c.1230 ).

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Walter de Thornhill II was born about 1225, in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, his father, John de Thornhill, was 46 and his mother, Olivia Mare, was 34. He married Cecelia Thornhill in 1274. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1260, at the age of 36.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Walter de Thornhill II est né environ 1225, à Thornhill, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, John de Thornhill, avait 46 ans et sa mère, Olivia Mare, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Cecelia Thornhill en 1274. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1260, à l’âge de 36 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Walter de Thornhill II um 1225 in Thornhill, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater John de Thornhill 46 und seine Mutter Olivia Mare 34. Er hat 1274 Cecelia Thornhill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1260 im Alter von 36 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Thornhill II è nato il circa 1225 nel Thornhill, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, John de Thornhill, aveva 46 anni e il suo madre, Olivia Mare, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Cecelia Thornhill nel 1274. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1260, all'età di 36 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Walter de Thornhill IIが約1225年にイギリスヨークシュアイアソルンヒルで生まれた時，父John de Thornhillは46歳，母Olivia Mareは34歳であった。1274年にCecelia Thornhillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1260年に36歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Walter de Thornhill II(이)가 대략 1225년 영국 요르크실르 토른힐에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John de Thornhill(은)는 46세였고, 그의 어머니 Olivia Mare(은)는 34세였다. 그는 1274년 Cecelia Thornhill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1260년 36세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Walter de Thornhill II nasceu aproximadamente 1225, em Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John de Thornhill, tinha 46 anos e sua mãe, Olivia Mare, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Cecelia Thornhill em 1274. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 1260, com 36 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Walter de Thornhill II родился около 1225 г. в местности таурнилл, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени John de Thornhill было 46 лет, а матери, которую звали Olivia Mare, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Cecelia Thornhill в 1274 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1260 г. в возрасте 36 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Walter de Thornhill II nació aproximadamente 1225, en Thornhill, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John de Thornhill, tenía 46 años y su mamá, Olivia Mare, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Cecelia Thornhill en 1274. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1260, a la edad de 36 años.
